channel.title: Comments on: Episode 39 – Raison D’Etre
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Connie
item.dc:creator: Connie
item.description: I'm a Dogfish Head fan. (Or maybe just an off-centered person.)
item.content:encoded: I’m a Dogfish Head fan. (Or maybe just an off-centered person.)

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: It's most likely a busy server, try again, it seems to play fine now. Thanks for checking in Mariah!
item.content:encoded: It’s most likely a busy server, try again, it seems to play fine now. Thanks for checking in Mariah!

item.title: By: Mariah Calagione
item.dc:creator: Mariah Calagione
item.description: Cant get this to play - would love to see it though!
item.content:encoded: Cant get this to play – would love to see it though!
